scripts.clean: cd packages/tui && bun run clean && cd ../ai && bun run clean && cd ../agent && bun run clean && cd ../coding-agent && bun run clean
scripts.build: cd packages/tui && bun run build && cd ../ai && bun run build && cd ../agent && bun run build && cd ../coding-agent && bun run build
scripts.typecheck: tsgo -p packages/tui/tsconfig.build.json && tsgo -p packages/ai/tsconfig.build.json && tsgo -p packages/agent/tsconfig.build.json && tsgo -p packages/coding-agent/tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
scripts.test: cd packages/tui && bun run test && cd ../ai && bun run test && cd ../agent && bun run test && cd ../coding-agent && bun run test
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run release:build && bun run release:verify
